overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character in an orange kimono exploring a lush coastal meadow. The character walks through tall grass to a cliff overlooking the ocean, surveys the landscape, and returns through fields of white wildflowers. The scene showcases the game's cinematic natural lighting and detailed vegetation.

events.description: approaching the rocky cliff edge as the ocean becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through tall grass toward the cliff edge with a sheathed sword on back

entered.detail: lush green meadow with tall grass swaying in the wind
single tree with green foliage on the left side of the path
forested mountain slope rising in the background
large rock formation marking the cliff edge ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense meadow of tall green grass, approaching a rocky cliff edge. A deciduous tree stands to the left while forested mountains rise in the background under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with panoramic ocean views

events.description: reaching the rocky cliff edge with expansive ocean vista opening up
character turns away from the ocean view to walk back inland

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge surveying the ocean and coastline, then turning to depart

entered.detail: vast blue ocean stretching to the horizon with visible coastline
dense evergreen forest covering the cliffs below
traditional Japanese structures visible on the distant cliffside
moss-covered stone ground at the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Standing atop the rocky cliff, the character overlooks a vast blue ocean with dense pine forests covering the slopes below. Traditional temple structures are visible in the distance along the coastline. The camera pans across the panoramic vista before the character turns to walk back inland.

agents.ego_description: walking back down through the meadow passing through fields of white wildflowers

entered.detail: meadow filled with white wildflowers among the green grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the cliff through a scenic meadow filled with white wildflowers. The path winds through scattered deciduous trees with the forested mountain range now dominating the center background as the character descends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense green meadow to a panoramic coastal cliffside before returning through a field of white wildflowers. It begins with the character walking through tall green grass toward a rocky cliff edge, with a deciduous tree to the left and forested mountains rising under a clear blue sky. As the character reaches the summit, the scene opens into a vast vista of the blue ocean and pine-covered slopes, revealing traditional temple structures along the distant coastline. The camera pans across this panoramic view before the character turns back inland, shifting the environment from the rocky precipice to a scenic meadow of white wildflowers. The shot finally follows the character as they descend through scattered trees with the forested mountain range dominating the background.
